headline: CoStar Office Leasing Rebound Tests Bearish Sentiment On Shares And Margins
summary: CoStar Group's latest preliminary Q1 data shows U.S. office leasing volumes above pre pandemic levels. The quarter marks the strongest office leasing activity since 2018 across major markets. The update highlights renewed activity in office properties at a time when many investors remain cautious on the sector. For CoStar Group (NasdaqGS:CSGP), the news comes after a difficult share price stretch. The stock is at $36.48 and has shown a 19.5% decline over 30 days, a 44.5% decline year to...
